title: Evaluation Manifest
description: Canonical evaluation manifest linking a pipeline run, engine output, review artifact, or advisor output to its evaluation results, evidence artifacts, and readiness status.

artifact_id.description: Stable identifier for this evaluation manifest instance.

artifact_version.description: Version of this artifact instance for diffing and rollback.

record_id.description: Record identifier used for provenance and diffing.

run_id.description: Deterministic run identifier for the workflow that produced this evaluation.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this evaluation manifest was generated (ISO 8601).

created_by.description: Agent that authored this evaluation manifest.

source_repo.description: Repository URL or slug where the evaluated run was produced.

source_repo_version.description: Git ref or version of the source repo at evaluation time.

system_id.description: Registered system identifier aligned to the ecosystem registry.

evaluation_type.description: Category of artifact set being evaluated.

evaluation_date.description: Date and time the evaluation was performed (ISO 8601).

criteria_applied.description: List of evaluation criteria or check names applied during this evaluation.

artifact_set.description: Set of artifacts evaluated in this manifest.

results_summary.description: Aggregated pass/fail/warning counts across all checks.

status.description: Overall evaluation outcome. 'partial' means some criteria passed and some failed. 'not-yet-evaluable' means required evidence is not yet available.

readiness_level.description: Readiness classification for the evaluated artifact set.

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence artifacts supporting this evaluation.

notes.description: Optional freeform context about anomalies, partial coverage, or caveats.

action_required.description: Whether this evaluation result requires a follow-up work item. True if one or more findings demand action; false if the evaluation is closed with no action needed.

linked_work_item_id.description: ID of the work item generated from this evaluation (e.g. WI-0001). Required when action_required is true; null when no action is needed.

rationale.description: Explanation for the evaluation outcome. Required when action_required is false to document why no action was taken.

role.description: Functional role of the agent in this context.

artifact_path.description: Relative or absolute path where the artifact is stored.

warnings.description: Number of checks that produced warnings.

ref_id.description: Identifier of the referenced evidence artifact.

ref_path.description: Optional relative path to the evidence artifact within the evidence bundle.
